sections.paragraph:
Original: אטר

Transliteration: 'âṭêr

Phonetic: aw-tare'

BDB Definition:

Ater = "binder"
  1. an exiled descendant of Hezekiah
  2. an exiled Levite porter (perhaps same as 1)
  3. a chief Israelite who sealed Nehemiah's covenant

Origin: from H332

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
